basic_details.job_title: PCMC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 63 ENT Specialist, Physician and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation Part-time Medical Specialists Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website of Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation. A total of 63 vacancies have been announced through the PCMC Part-time Medical Specialists Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 70 years of age who possess a Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB/Diploma) in the relevant specialty along with valid Maharashtra Medical Council registration and a medical fitness certificate are eligible to apply for these Part-time Medical Specialists vacancies. The walk-in interview proc

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB/Diploma) in relevant specialty, Valid Maharashtra Medical Council registration, Medical fitness certificate
qualification.details: Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB/Diploma) in relevant specialty. Valid Maharashtra Medical Council registration. Medical fitness certificate.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 2000 fixed + Rs. 100 per patient (max Rs. 5000 per visit)
salary_details.details: Rs. 2000 fixed + Rs. 100 per patient (maximum Rs. 5000 per visit). Physician, Obstetrics & Gynecologist, Pediatrician: Once a week. Ophthalmologist, Dermatologist, Psychiatrist, ENT Specialist: Once a fortnight.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Merit based on 50 marks (Subject Knowledge

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for PCMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify a last date for the walk-in interview. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise dates and timings.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Part-time Medical Specialists at PCMC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 63 vacancies available for the Part-time Medical Specialists posts at the Pimpri Chinchwad Municipal Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for PCMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Part-time Medical Specialists posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Part-time Medical Specialists posts is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 2000 fixed plus Rs. 100 per patient, with a maximum limit of Rs. 5000 per visit.

faq.question: Q6. What are the essential qualifications required for the PCMC Medical Specialist roles?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree (MD/MS/DNB/Diploma) in the relevant specialty and have a valid Maharashtra Medical Council registration.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for PCMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview, with merit being based on 50 marks evaluating subject knowledge, research, leadership, administrative abilities, and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age relaxation provided for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age relaxation for reserved categories. Candidates should refer to the official notification for details.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview for PCMC Recruitment 2026 scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The specific venue for the walk-in interview is not mentioned in the provided data. Candidates should consult the official notification for the exact location and reporting time.

faq.answer: The provided data does not specify a last date for the walk-in interview. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise dates and timings.
